questions.text: Pritak Patel it's probably a long shot, but have we helped other customers negotiate Paylocity's API fees in the past?
questions.rationale: Historical fee negotiation context requires human institutional knowledge.

questions.text:
Nishka Chotai Prad Biswas Do we have examples of Merge customers that use our Workday integration, and were then able to become Workday Preferred Partners with us powering the integration?
A prospect of mine wants to ensure that using a Merge powered integration doesn't impede them to being a UKG and/or Workday partner?
questions.rationale: Requires specific customer references and partnership knowledge, hard to automate.

questions.text: Jemma Baus iirc FirstUp did and you may have other customers who have, right?
questions.rationale: Needs human recall of specific customer partnership history.

questions.text: Any idea if its the same using Merge to power the integration vs. them building direct to get a partnership?
questions.rationale: Nuanced partnership eligibility question needing human expertise.

questions.text: Hmm how does workday approve the integration?
questions.rationale: Process question likely documented in partnership FAQ.

questions.text: Sg sg - is UKG any different?
questions.rationale: Comparison of vendor processes possibly documented.

questions.text: Apologies if there's an existing thread already, what is the latest on where we stand in the app review process?
questions.rationale: Status inquiry requires human tracking of current progress.
